Our Story

A Unique Patisserie

Heavenly Bites is a unique patisserie specializing in creating magical desserts that awaken all the senses. Every creation is meticulous, every flavor is thoughtful, and every moment is unforgettable.

We source locally, bake daily, and never compromise — because every bite should be exactly that: heavenly.

All Natural
No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives.
Baked Fresh
Every item made fresh same morning, never frozen.
Local Sourcing
Supporting local farmers and trusted suppliers.
Custom Orders
Every celebration cake is uniquely designed for you.
What We Make

Our Menu

Bestseller
Israeli Breakfast Platter

A mezze tray of tahini, labneh, tuna, guacamole and feta dips, granola yogurt cups, a fluffy omelette, fresh salad and coffee.

$24
Fresh Daily
Artisan Bread Basket

Crusty baguette, round country sourdough, sesame-topped roll and a seeded multigrain bun — all stone-baked fresh each morning.

$11
Chef's Pick
Canapé & Bruschetta Platter

Cherry tomato & mozzarella tartlets, smoked salmon toasts, and herbed bruschetta — each finished with a drizzle of olive oil.

$32
Specialty
Signature Latte

House-roasted espresso under silky steamed milk, finished with our signature heart latte art. Hot, iced, or oat milk.

$6
Light & Fresh
Fresh Garden Salad

Crisp mixed leaves, egg, black olives, sweet bell peppers, baby mozzarella and fresh herbs, tossed in a light house vinaigrette.

$17
Gift Box
Sweet Bites Gift Box

An assortment of our finest bite-sized treats — mini tartlets, crostini and seasonal sweets, beautifully boxed for gifting or sharing.

$26
How We Craft

From Our Oven to Your Table

Every Heavenly Bites creation follows a meticulous process perfected over eight years to ensure your order arrives in peak condition.

01
You Order

Place your order online or by phone. Tell us your occasion, preferences, and any dietary needs.

02
We Prepare

Our chefs source fresh ingredients and begin multi-layer preparation the evening before your delivery.

03
We Bake

Every item baked fresh on the morning of delivery or collection. No pre-baking, no freezing — ever.

04
Delivered Fresh

Packed in signature boxes and delivered chilled to preserve every detail, ready to impress and delight.

What Customers Say

Loved Across Tel Aviv

4.9
Based on 2,400+ reviews

"The Israeli breakfast platter was extraordinary — the granola yogurt, the fresh cheeses, the warm breads straight from the oven. It felt like someone's grandmother made it just for us."

Sarah & Ron Levi
Wedding Celebration

"The sourdough is unlike anything else in Petah Tikva. And their coffee — just perfect. I start every Friday here and honestly it sets the tone for the whole weekend."

Ready to Make Your Moment Unforgettable?

Whether you're celebrating a birthday, planning a corporate event, or simply treating yourself — we'll craft something truly special. Fill in the form and we'll be in touch within 4 hours.

100% Freshness Guarantee
Baked fresh on delivery day. Not delighted? We'll make it right.
Response Within 4 Hours
Our team confirms and discusses any custom requirements promptly.
Delivery Across Greater Tel Aviv
Free delivery on orders over $50. Same-day available before 10am.
